message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 12

class MonoBehaviour <<C>> {
}

class SwordAttack <<C>> {
  animator : Animator
  attackDamage : float = 50f
  staminaCost : float = 15f
  «readonly» hIsAttacking : int
  playerStats : Stats.Stats
  noOfClicks : int
  canClick : bool
  «readonly» hAttackNo : int
  --
  Start() : void
  Update() : void
  OnTriggerEnter(other:Collider) : void
  ComboStarter() : void
  ComboCheck() : void
}

SwordAttack --|> MonoBehaviour
@enduml
